title: rubus × agnatus
intro: Rubus × agnatus, a hybrid of the raspberry and blackberry species, is a type of bramble known for its dense, thorny canes and edible fruit. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus × agnatus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The fruit can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, jams, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
